title: Wang Ling's Triple Kill of Tuntian-ha
overview: Wang Ling is  rookie at the Songhai School. With only 5 points of spiritual strength, he will have to face some problems.

title: A Fair and Just Class President Election
overview: Sun Rong and Chen Chao compete for the position of student president of the elite class. Will Sun Rong be able to pull it off with an enchantment?

title: How to Make an Origin Fostering Pill
overview: In  the elite class, students learn how to make vitality pulls. Although the others use wacky ovens or cauldrons, Wang Ling decides to use a microwave.

title: What Should I Do When the Goddess Forces Me on a Date
overview: Sun Rong asks Wang Ling out on a special date. But what she doesn't know is that two killers will try to spoil her fun.

title: The Three Brothers of Shadow Stream
overview: The killers return to attack the school. But this time the school is prepared to face any threat. However, the attack of the three brothers is too powerful.

title: B++ is the Best Language in the World
overview: Wang Ling comes out first in the national power test and decides to infiltrate the system to change his score.

title: 18 Tips for Maintaining a Spiritual Sword
overview: Wang Ling will participate in the interschool sword competition with his friends against his rival, the 59th school.

title: Like Master, Like Sword
overview: Wang Ling doesn't want to participate in the competition and looks for the perfect moment to pretend to feel bad. When his amulet is about to break, Wang Ling's health is in danger of seriously deteriorating.

title: Master of the Shadow Stream
overview: Wang Ling needs his father to come to his aid or disaster is imminent. While he waits, Wang Ling runs into a dangerous female leader in the halls of School 59.

title: Drive! Drive! Drive!
overview: The amulet is broken and now Wang Ling must control his emotions on his own. Meanwhile, Sun Rong is ready to help her most important friend.

title: The Aohai Rondo
overview: Wang Ling tries to keep a low profile now that his amulet is broken. At the Water Alter, Sun Rong confronts Tang Jingze.

title: A Dog is a Man's Best Friend
overview: As Wang Ling begins to lose control, Toad jumps on top of him and absorbs his negative energy. At that moment, something amazing happens that gives Wang Ling the ability to use his strength without restraint from him.

title: Let Us Burn!!
overview: Tang Jingze's spirit sword engages Sun Rong and destroys his weapon. Wang Ling's father implores them to stop the competition before someone gets hurt.

title: Accident
overview: The competition comes to an end. The leader of the League of Shadows attacks and Wang Ling finally loses control.

title: Helplessness of the Immortal King
overview: Wang Ling quickly realizes his mistake: not having stopped the leader of the League of Shadows sooner, so he decides to take the risk once more.

title: Wang Ling Wants To Lead A Quiet Life
overview: After nearly depleting the planet's spiritual energy by going back in time, Wang Ling dreams of only one thing: to be left alone. Unfortunately, fate seems to have other plans for him.

title: A Home Visit By The Demon Master
overview: Sent to Earth to annihilate the human race and conquer the planet, Chienpaud is far from having achieved his goals. His master decides to come and ask him to account.

title: The Idle Beauty
overview: Ten years ago, the famous assassin nicknamed "Vagabond Charmer" disappeared without a trace. Some rumors claim that he is hiding near the 60th school of Songhai…

title: How To Forge A Spiritual Sword
overview: After taking a class on spirit swords at school, Wang Ling and his friends decide to go and have their respective weapons serviced.

title: The Four Bizarre Tales of Faction 60
overview: Four great legends circulate in the 60th school. Is there any truth behind the rumors?

title: The Internet Is Not A Lawless Paradise
overview: Seduced by a streamer, Chen Chao becomes a little too obsessive. His worried friends try to get him back in touch with reality.

title: The Foolish Old Man's Spirit in the Sun Family
overview: The wealthy Sun family is going through a difficult phase. Fortunately, they are not the type to give up.

title: A Sword Dance of the Five Elements
overview: Several students from the 60th school decide to enter the Songhai Artistic Fencing Competition to prove that spiritual swords are more than weapons.

title: A Train to the Twinkling Stars
overview: After the contest misadventure, the whole planet fell madly in love with Sun Rong. If he doesn't quickly find a way to ward off the spell, things will end badly.

title: Extra: The Director Is Not Home Today
overview: The Elite class of the 60th school of Songhai visits an animation studio and discovers the harsh reality of jobs in the sector.

title: The Coming
overview: The Demon Emperor seems to have realized that Wang Ling poses a considerable threat, while Richman is still determined to destroy Earth. The apocalypse is closer than ever.

title: The Observer Beyond Time and Space
overview: The survival of all mankind is threatened by the invasion of demons. Will Wang Ling stand up to an empire that has already conquered countless planets?

title: Top Girl vs Top Girl
overview: After repelling the demonic invasion, Wang Ling hopes to finally be able to lead a peaceful life. Unfortunately for him, the arrival of a new student will upset his daily life.

title: Froggy2's Birthday
overview: After the destruction of the demon world, the demons were displaced in the human world. The Jiugong family sent their eldest daughter, Jiugong Ryoko, to study at the "Sixty Gates" of the Huaxiu Kingdom to secretly collect demons and send them back to Sun Island. Wang Ling and other people in and Jiugong Ryoko get along, gradually found her and the whole Jiugong family's true purpose ...... against the sky of the immortal king, and this time to secretly why the battle?

title: It'll Be You, Silvie!
overview: Wang Ling and his friends set out to pick premium immortal herbs. They will quickly realize that they are not alone in the mountains.

title: Silvie's Uproar
overview: Guo Hao's new familiar leaves no one indifferent. Stella is perpetually surrounded by a crowd of admirers, among which have crept individuals thirsty for unicorn blood.

title: You Are My Sword
overview: A mysterious swordswoman is stirring up trouble in Songhai by systematically challenging every sword-wielder she finds. At the same time, Jingke enters a rebellious phase and refuses to obey Wang Ling.

title: It's My Round
overview: The main clans of Songhai are gathered for the sale of the year, where they will have to fight to acquire priceless treasures. Meanwhile, Wang Ling is faced with concerns of an entirely different order.

title: Welcome To Join the Exorcist Team!
overview: The Exorcists seem to have invaded Songhai City. Guo Hao takes a dim view of their presence, unlike Chen Chao who is not insensitive to the charisma of these newcomers.

title: A False Hero
overview: For ten years, Zhuo Yi has been the undisputed hero of Songhai City. Unfortunately for him, his imposture is about to come to light.

title: Oaths On High Saint's Day
overview: Wang Ling and his friends prepare to attend the Saints' Gala, an annual party held at the Sun family's Celestial Paradise. Wang Ling is going to have to prove himself if he is to be considered worthy of staying by Sun Rong's side.

title: The Sun Family's Sacred Cudgel Is Lost (Mission Accomplished Version)
overview: In order to rise in her father's esteem, Yoshiko Kyûmiya is determined to steal the Sun Family's sacred staff. To achieve this, she will have to find a partner and infiltrate the Saints' Day gala.

title: A Daring Journey to Sunland
overview: With the help of Lord Thunder, Wang Ling and Sun Rong investigate the theft of the sacred staff. They are about to uncover the dark plot that threatens Eternia.

title: Reconciled
overview: After many years spent in the human world, Chienpaud's identity is murky. Now that Zhuo Yi has unraveled the secret of the Kyumiya Volcano, the time has come for the former demonic king to choose sides.

title: Way-of-Heaven-level Swordsmanship
overview: Wang Ling and his comrades first hear of the legendary swordsman Fanrui, who can master the Celestial Style. Under the guidance of Mr. Wang, the students of the 60th school will learn new ways of wielding the sword.

title: Snack Noodle in Collector`s Edition
overview: Sun Rong fainted after falling victim to Wang Ling's flash of amnesia. Her grandfather is worried about her and sends her for a battery of medical exams.

title: Resonance Between Masters
overview: Fanrui, the immortal swordsman, decided that Wang Ling would make an ideal successor. Unfortunately for him, Wang Ling has no intention of showing him his abilities.

title: Underground Spiritual Vein
overview: The earth's crust is dotted with veins that supply the atmosphere with spiritual energy. What would happen if one of these veins was seriously damaged? Wang Ling and his friends are about to have the answer...

title: Wang Ling's Art of Great Luck
overview: Wang Ling decides to make a gift for Zhuo Yi. He goes shopping with his friends, who turn out to be easy prey for unscrupulous sellers. Will Wang Ling manage to save them from debt?

title: It's All Your Fault
overview: Wang Ling agreed to participate in the 60th school charity sale. To obtain items to sell, he will once again turn to the Ways.

title: Art of Explosion?
overview: After the failures of White Tiger and Azure Dragon, the 60th school will have to deal with the third of the Four Animals. Will the explosive Vermilion Bird be more skilled than his brothers in arms?

title: Defending the Faction 60
overview: Black Turtle, the last member of the Four Animals, is determined to avenge his brothers. He is preparing to use an ancestral technique to attack the 60th school, whose students are preparing for the worst.

title: Rong Is in Dander
overview: The Four Animals were actually more than four! The fifth member of this dangerous school decides to attack Sun Rong to avenge his classmates.

title: Start Immortal King Mode
overview: After borrowing a fraction of Wang Ling's strength, Sun Rong is now able to face Ocher Dragon. Will she manage to leave the spiritual dimension of which she is prisoner?

title: Birth of Evil Sword Lord
overview: Taking advantage of a moment of inattention from the guardians, Chen Nanxuan finally managed to awaken to a Way. When he discovers that his disciples have been decimated in his absence, he decides to do everything possible to take revenge.

title: War between True Immortals
overview: Yi Jianchuan finally faces Chen Nanxuan, more powerful than ever after awakening to a Way. Wang Ling's friends are convinced that they are attending an immersive theatrical performance, far from suspecting that the stakes of the fight are very real.

title: Birth of the Demon Child?
overview: Wang Ling, his family, and the world are preparing for the arrival of the Immortal King's little sister.

title: Its Name
overview: Wang Ling and his friends are sent to the Songhai First Prison on a field mission.

title: What to Do if Being Stuck in Writing
overview: Wang Ling's father has to write to support his family, but he lacks inspiration.

title: The Legendary Cultivator Mystic Ax Spirit Mother
overview: Wang Ling and his companions are about to learn the Mystic Ax Divine Technique, when Yekui attacks them.

title: Wang Zukang's Feeler
overview: Wang Zukang's investigations into his teacher's whereabouts lead him to Wang Ling's house.

title: Huaxiu Celestial Ranking Tournament
overview: The quadrennial Huaxiu Celestial Tournament of Huaxiu is about to begin, and as always, Wang Ling is involved.

title: Welcome, My Immortal Sister
overview: While the monk Jindeng and Master Crispy Noodles face off, Wang Ling's little sister is about to be born.

title: Muscle Remodeling with Protein Sect
overview: Chen Chao and Wang Ling attend a bodybuilding school.

title: Making a Sword Spirit for Little Sister
overview: Wang Nuan's parents want to give her a Spirit Sword while she's still young, but Wang Ling decides to help.

title: Heavenly Dao's Secret
overview: Wang Nuan doesn't want to be separated from her brother, so Wang Ling is forced to take her to school.

title: The Realm-Wide Wanted: Wang Ling
overview: Wang Ling’s family life is turned upside down with the arrival of a little sister, Wang Nuan.

title: Siblings Alliance
overview: Wang Ling’s family life is turned upside down with the arrival of a little sister, Wang Nuan.
